name: Creamed Broccoli Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Boiling chicken bouillon (reduced by half)
A good pinch of ground cloves
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the broccoli in a large saucepan with the celery and onion.
2. Pour in the boiling chicken bouillon (reduced by half) and bring to a boil.
3. Simmer for 15-20 minutes, or until the vegetables are very soft.
4. Blend the soup into a puree using an electric blender.
5. Season the soup to taste with ground cloves, salt, and pepper.
6. Stir in lemon juice and a dash of Tabasco sauce.
7. Thin the soup to the desired consistency by adding heavy cream (1 1/2 to 2 cups).
8. Adjust seasonings as needed.
9. Reheat gently, stirring occasionally, and be careful not to let the soup boil.
